title: Rates monitor (US + global CB)
description: 8-tab rates monitor: US curve overview / curve detail (brush) / macro overlay (dual-axis ISM) plus 5 identical-shape tabs for Fed / ECB / BoE / BoJ / EM with KPI + policy-rate line + cut-prob gauge + decisions bar. Stress-tests high-tab-count layouts.
name: rates_monitor

title: Cross-asset snapshot
description: Four major asset classes in one conversational composite (SPX, DXY, WTI, Gold) with event annotations.
name: cross_asset

title: Risk regime monitor
description: Cross-asset correlation heatmap, VIX term structure across regimes, factor-return boxplots, and running drawdown with a bear-market band.
name: risk_regime

title: FOMC policy monitor
description: Fed policy: probability gauge, FFR futures candlestick, dot plot vs realized (strokeDash), voter hawk/dove radar, decision calendar heatmap, dual-axis rates chart. Metadata + header_actions.
name: fomc_monitor

title: Global flows & allocation
description: Cross-border trade sankey + outbound donut, treemap + sunburst allocation, counterparty graph network, mandate funnel, stat_grid.
name: global_flows

title: Equity deep dive
description: Single-name tear sheet: candlestick + volume, EPS actuals vs consensus (strokeDash), analyst bar_horizontal, beta scatter-trendline, return histogram, valuation bullet, KPI info/popup, header_actions, refresh metadata.
name: equity_deep_dive

title: Portfolio analytics
description: Multi-asset portfolio: VaR gauge, factor radar, allocation pie, stacked-area P&L, parallel-coords positions, return-distribution histogram, stat_grid.
name: portfolio_analytics

title: Cross-asset end-of-day wrap
description: One big scrollable cross-asset wrap: KPI ribbon, equities / rates / FX / commodities sections, dual-axis + bar_horizontal charts, click-emit-filter, top-movers table with z-score colour scale. Stress-tests layout w/ 17 charts.
name: markets_wrap

title: Screener studio (tables / filters / drill-down)
description: Three-tab toolbox. Tab 1: RV screen with conditional formatting + z-score colour scale + drill-down time-series. Tab 2: all 9 filter types on one dataset. Tab 3: bond universe with row_click.detail rich-modal (stats / markdown / charts / sub-table sections).
name: screener_studio
